texto: One good thing I'd like to say about divorce is that it sometimes makes it possible for you to be a much better wife to your next husband because you have a place for your anger
autor: it's not directed at the person you're currently with.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a it's not directed at the person you're currently with.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades.
